title: netherite combat
description: Changes the textures of arrows, tipped arrows, bows, tridents, maces, shields and totems of undying to look like netherite!
body:
A texture pack that turns combat items to netherite!

Current items:
_trident, mace, bow, arrow, tipped arrow, shield and totem of undying_

Crossbow and more coming later

I made this project for fun, also because when playing it annoys me that tridents, bows, shields and maces look different from netherite gear so i made this!
